x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.

x-swarm-guidance.rationale: Adds --limit / --state / --label flags to triage_cache populate and triage_bootstrap pass-through. Without these, Phase 0 first-run on any real-sized backlog is unbounded -- effectively makes the bulk-ingestion skill unusable for new maintainers. Bonus: infer --repo from git remote get-url origin when omitted.
